title: taraxacum cerdanicum
intro: Taraxacum cerdanicum, also known as the Cerdan dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum cerdanicum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve liver function, as well as its use as a natural diuretic to support kidney health. Taraxacum cerdanicum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
